product_name: ANIME HEROES Beyond - Naruto - Kakashi Susano Ver. Action Figure w/ Accessory Pack

bullets: Step into the world of Naruto – Kakashi Hatake is the Copy Ninja, capable of copying Jutus with his Sharingan! After a harrowing battle during the 7th Great Ninja War and with the help of his old friend, Obito Uchiha, Kakashi has unleashed his Susano to fight against Kaguya!
Manga Inspired packaging – Each Anime Heroes Beyond line has anime inspired packaging and beautiful artwork on the front featuring the characters you know and love
Endless Play - Each figure come with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, character specific accessories, and additional effect parts, 20+ points of articulation to pose and play in a more endless ways
Collect them all - Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles America has a full line-up of Naruto action figures for you to show off your fandom and collect your favorite characters
Impressive likeness – Each figure comes with detailed sculpt and true to show features that Anime Heroes action figures are known for
content.description: Bandai’s NEWEST Anime Heroes Naruto action figure line comes out with an exciting way to pose and display your favorite Naruto Shippuden figures! Anime Heroes Naruto Beyond comes with a figure with 20 points of articulation and is packed with all new accessories to help create those iconic scenes in the anime. For ages 4 and up.
